Task Manager

task_manager_project module

Task Manager Module

A simple command-line task manager that supports: - Adding tasks - Marking tasks as completed - Deleting tasks - Sorting tasks - Searching tasks

task_manager_project.add_task(tasks, task)

Add a new task.

Parameters:

  • tasks -- list of tasks

  • task -- task description

Returns:

None

Example: >>> tasks = [] >>> add_task(tasks, "Buy milk") >>> tasks [('Buy milk', False)]

task_manager_project.binary_search(tasks, target)

Search for a task.

Parameters:

  • tasks -- list of tasks (must be sorted)

  • target -- task description

Returns:

index or -1

task_manager_project.delete_task(tasks, index)

Delete a task.

Parameters:

  • tasks -- list of tasks

  • index -- task index

Returns:

None

task_manager_project.install(package)
task_manager_project.list_tasks(tasks)

Display tasks.

Parameters:

tasks -- list of tasks

Returns:

None

task_manager_project.main()
task_manager_project.mark_task_completed(tasks, index)

Mark a task as completed.

Parameters:

  • tasks -- list of tasks

  • index -- task index

Returns:

None

task_manager_project.sort_tasks(tasks)

Sort tasks alphabetically.

Parameters:

tasks -- list of tasks

Returns:

None
